scripts.build: bun run i18n:build && vite build && wrangler types --env-interface Env
scripts.build:preview: bun run i18n:build && vite build && wrangler types --env-interface Env
scripts.build:production: bun run i18n:build && vite build && wrangler types --env-interface Env
scripts.deploy: bun run build:production && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.deploy:preview: bun run build:preview && wrangler deploy --env preview
scripts.deploy:production: bun run build:production && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.check: bun run i18n:build && svelte-kit sync && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json
scripts.check:watch: bun run i18n:build && svelte-kit sync && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json --watch
